The '''ST-101 Repulsortruck''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] model manufactured by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]]. An ST-101 cost 12,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] new and about 3,000 used.

==History==
A customized version of this vehicle was used by the transport specialist [[Tandy]] on [[Ord Vaxal]].

{{Veh-stub}}
